latest.title: Minha primeira semana com o AWS Builder Center: o que eu aprendi.
latest.description: Uma experiência inicial em computação em nuvem, destacando o aprendizado prático.

latest.title: How I Earned AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner Using Builder Center and Cloud Clubs
latest.description: A beginner-friendly journey of how structured learning through AWS Builder Center and consistent support from AWS Cloud Clubs helped me achieve my first AWS certification.

latest.title: Mastering AWS Network Observability: A Practical Guide
latest.description: A practical guide to building end-to-end network observability on AWS — covering the key metrics, alarms, and tools across EC2, VPC Flow Logs, NAT Gateway, Network Firewall, PrivateLink, and the CloudWatch Network Monitoring suite to help you detect, diagnose, and resolve network issues before they impact your customers.

latest.title: How to Use Kiro for Network Operations
latest.description: How to use Kiro CLI as an AI-powered network operations tool — replacing manual console hopping and CLI memorization with natural language prompts that discover your architecture, validate routes, analyze firewall logs, and run full operational health checks in seconds.

latest.title: Durable Handoff Multi-Agent Workflow
latest.description: Durable handoff multi-agent workflow with Amazon Simple Storage Service (S3)

latest.title: How to Secure a WordPress Site: 10 Proven Security Tips
latest.description: Learn how to secure a WordPress site with 10 proven tips. Protect your website from hackers, malware, and threats using this simple guide.

latest.title: 5 Coisas que Todo Universitário Pode Aprender no AWS Builder Center ☁️
latest.description: Quando eu entrei no AWS Builder Center pela primeira vez, não sabia exatamente o que esperar. Achei que seria uma plataforma técnica demais, cheia de conteúdo difícil, feita só pra quem já trabalha na área. Mas me surpreendi.

latest.title: It Works on My Machine… Until It Doesn’t: Why Backends Break in Production and How to Fix It with Queues
latest.description: Learn why backend systems fail when moving from local development to production and how to use AWS SQS to build more resilient and scalable architectures.

latest.title: Unlocking AWS Cost Efficiency with the DevOps Agent
latest.description: Join Stephanie Gooch and her guests, as they explore the AWS DevOps Agent and its role in enhancing cost efficiency through automated incident management and FinOps integration.

latest.title: Improve Application Quality and Differentiation with Model Customization on AWS Services
latest.description: This article outlines the spectrum of AWS model customization techniques, from prompt engineering and RAG to fine-tuning and bespoke model building, with guidance on selecting the right approach. It includes a decision framework, an overview of relevant AWS services, and best practices for driving measurable business outcomes.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: NeuroVoice
trending.description: Small moments, repeated daily, reveal what single snapshots never can - patterns that quietly signal neurological risk. NeuroVoice is a multimodal Parkinson’s screening platform that tracks pattern over time to detect subtle neurological changes early.

trending.title: AWS Summit London Attendee Exclusive: Builder Question of the Day
trending.description: If you're attending the AWS Summit in London, come say hi at the Developer Community Zone in the Expo and get involved in our Builder Question of the Day challenge!

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: ASET – Academic Safety and Evidencing Truth
trending.description: ASET (Academic Safety and Evidencing Truth) is an AI-powered claim verification platform built on AWS that verifies scientific claims against 1.2M+ peer-reviewed papers across 8 domains — and automatically fetches and permanently stores new papers from arXiv, PubMed, etc. when gaps are found, making the knowledge base self-growing with every query. From typed claims to YouTube videos and uploaded documents, ASET delivers evidence-backed trust scores in under 10 seconds.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Global Impact AI Navigator
trending.description: Global Impact AI Navigator (GIAN) is a multi-agent AI platform built on Amazon Bedrock that transforms a raw idea into a complete strategic package in under 60 seconds — SWOT diagnostic, live-grounded funding discovery, personalized roadmap, and a context-aware advisor. Designed for innovators in emerging markets, it democratizes access to the strategic guidance that usually requires expensive consultants or elite networks.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Veloquity - The Agentic Evidence Intelligent Platform Turning Raw Feedback into Evidence-Driven Decisions
trending.description: Decisions don’t fail from too little data - they fail from too much noise. Veloquity, an agentic evidence intelligence platform, filters that noise by transforming fragmented feedback into validated evidence and delivering explainable, prioritized recommendations with full source-to-decision traceability that guides human decisions. READ ON TO SEE HOW.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: RetainIQ
trending.description: Detect knowledge concentration risk before it costs you. RetainIQ scores every critical topic 0–100 and triggers AI interventions. Zero docs effort required.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Ivy - The World's First Offline-Capable, Proactive AI Tutoring Agent
trending.description: A proactive AI tutoring agent powered by Amazon Bedrock that monitors student progress, initiates outbound voice calls, and runs on-device inference for offline learning addressing educational inequity for millions of Ethiopian students with intermittent connectivity.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: CarbonZero
trending.description: AI-Powered Carbon Accounting & Gamified Compliance for African Businesses and Individuals. Built with Kiro and AWS, CarbonZero helps African SMEs and exporters track emissions, achieve EU CBAM compliance, and turn sustainability into a competitive advantage — now with the audit trails, carbon passports, and accounting sync to make it real.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Aether Health
trending.description: Discover how our AI-powered platform reimagines the last mile of healthcare by focusing on empathetic symptom checking and prescription decoding. We provide verified, calming tools to combat health anxiety and prevent dangerous medication errors for vulnerable populations.

trending.title: It Works on My Machine… Until It Doesn’t: Why Backends Break in Production and How to Fix It with Queues
trending.description: Learn why backend systems fail when moving from local development to production and how to use AWS SQS to build more resilient and scalable architectures.
